'''鈭歡-v-z-ng''' ('''kagavzengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exoculate|exoculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exoculate|exoculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-v-z-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagavzengoko
|}
